sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Is China Yuchai International (CYD) outperforming other auto-tires-trucks stocks this year?
feed.summary: This article poses a question about whether China Yuchai International (CYD) is outperforming its peers in the auto-tires-trucks sector this year, implying a financial analysis is needed to answer. Without specific financial data or performance metrics, the article itself doesn't provide a definitive answer but rather highlights the query for investors.

feed.title: Arch Capital’s Q1’26 underwriting income rises by 75%
feed.summary: Arch Capital Group Ltd. saw its underwriting income surge by 74.6% to $728 million in Q1 2026, driven by strong performance in both its insurance and reinsurance segments and an improved combined ratio. The company reported a significant increase in net income available to common shareholders, reaching $1 billion. Despite a drop in gross and net premiums written across the group, Arch achieved an annualised operating return on average common equity of 15.4%.

feed.title: China Exposure Hits Lam Research, Applied Materials, KLA Stocks
feed.summary: Shares of Lam Research, Applied Materials, and KLA Corporation dropped significantly due to new US export restrictions on chipmaking tools destined for China. These restrictions, targeting facilities like Hua Hong Semiconductor, raise concerns about future semiconductor equipment demand and highlight the risk for suppliers heavily exposed to the Chinese market. The situation underscores how geopolitical pressures are increasingly affecting the semiconductor equipment sector, impacting market outlook for companies relying on Chinese customers.

feed.title: Travelers returns with $500m target for new Long Point Re IV 2026-1 cat bond
feed.summary: Travelers is returning to the catastrophe bond market with a target of $500 million for a new Long Point Re IV 2026-1 issuance. This multi-peril cat bond aims to replace its maturing 2022-1 issuance, providing reinsurance protection against tropical cyclone, earthquake, severe thunderstorm, and winter storm events in Northeastern U.S. states. The new bond will have an initial attachment probability of 1.68% and an expected loss of 1.38%, with price guidance between 4% and 4.75%.

feed.title: Bingham Private Wealth LLC Acquires Shares of 11,789 Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL
feed.summary: Bingham Private Wealth LLC has acquired a new stake of 11,789 shares in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL), valued at approximately $3.69 million, making it their 6th largest holding. This acquisition comes as Alphabet beat its Q4 earnings estimates, leading analysts to maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target price of $369.67. Despite significant insider selling, institutional investors collectively own 40.03% of the company's stock.

feed.title: Ashton Thomas Private Wealth LLC Decreases Holdings in VICI Properties Inc. $VICI
feed.summary: Ashton Thomas Private Wealth LLC significantly reduced its stake in VICI Properties Inc. by over 54% in the fourth quarter, selling 71,428 shares. Despite this, other major institutional investors like Vanguard Group, State Street Corp, and Allianz Asset Management GmbH increased their holdings in VICI Properties during the same period. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average consensus price target of $33.42.

feed.title: Ashton Thomas Private Wealth LLC Invests $1.60 Million in The Campbell's Company $CPB
feed.summary: Ashton Thomas Private Wealth LLC has acquired a new stake worth approximately $1.60 million in The Campbell's Company (NASDAQ:CPB) during the fourth quarter. Other institutional investors have also significantly modified their holdings in CPB, with 52.35% of the stock owned by hedge funds and institutional investors. The article details Campbell's financial performance, dividend announcement, and recent analyst ratings.

feed.title: WM cites recycling as a factor in earnings growth
feed.summary: WM (Waste Management Inc.) reported a 13.5 percent increase in net income for the first quarter, attributing this growth to disciplined pricing, cost optimization, and sustainability projects, including recycling and renewable energy. Despite a decrease in the average price received for single-stream recycled commodities, the company's recycling and renewable energy business units saw increased operating EBITDA due to higher volumes and automation. WM also highlighted the positive impact of its 2024 acquisition of Stericycle and the opening of new recycling facilities, positioning itself for continued financial growth through 2026.

feed.title: What To Expect From Labcorp’s (LH) Q1 Earnings
feed.summary: Labcorp Holdings (LH) is set to report its Q1 earnings this Thursday, with analysts expecting a 4.8% year-on-year revenue growth. The company missed revenue estimates last quarter but exceeded full-year EPS guidance. Recent Q1 results from peers NeoGenomics and Quest Diagnostics showed revenue beats, while Labcorp's stock has seen a slight decline despite positive investor sentiment in the healthcare providers & services segment.

feed.title: Earnings To Watch: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Reports Q1 Results Tomorrow
feed.summary: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) is scheduled to report its Q1 earnings tomorrow, with market expectations set for a 4.4% year-on-year revenue growth. The company previously beat revenue estimates but slightly missed EPS guidance, and analysts have largely reconfirmed their estimates. Recent sector performance and analyst price targets suggest a positive sentiment heading into the earnings report.

feed.title: Arlington Trust Co LLC Has $31,000 Position in The Progressive Corporation $PGR
feed.summary: Arlington Trust Co LLC significantly reduced its stake in The Progressive Corporation ($PGR) by 97.9%, now holding 134 shares valued at $31,000. Despite an EPS beat of $4.80 for the quarter, Progressive missed revenue estimates. The company also declared a $0.10 quarterly dividend and holds a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average target price of $238.39, while insiders have sold over $1.44 million in shares.

feed.title: Delta suspends five international leisure routes in summer peak season
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines is temporarily suspending service on five international leisure routes for summer and fall 2026 as part of a schedule adjustment strategy, citing shifting seasonal demand, aircraft deployment, and rising jet fuel costs. Affected routes include flights to Nassau, Mexico City, Cancun, San José del Cabo, and Puerto Vallarta. Delta plans to rebook passengers, offer connections through other hubs, or provide refunds, and expects most routes to return during the peak winter travel season.

feed.title: 13,154 Shares in Gartner, Inc. $IT Purchased by Ashton Thomas Private Wealth LLC
feed.summary: Ashton Thomas Private Wealth LLC initiated a new position in Gartner, Inc. (NYSE:IT) during the fourth quarter, acquiring 13,154 shares valued at approximately $3.32 million. The information technology services provider recently reported better-than-expected earnings per share but issued slightly tempered FY2026 guidance compared to analyst consensus. The company is also facing securities fraud investor alerts and potential class-action lawsuits, adding a near-term legal and settlement risk.

feed.title: Isobutanol Market Is Going to Boom | BASF, Eastman Chemical Company, Shell Chemicals
feed.summary: A new report on the Isobutanol Market, published by Coherent Market Insights, predicts significant growth from 2026 to 2033. The report analyzes current trends, growth drivers, challenges, and opportunities, providing insights into the competitive landscape and technological developments. It includes a comprehensive assessment of market dynamics, regional outlook, and profiles of key companies like BASF, Eastman Chemical Company, and Shell Chemicals.

feed.title: Advisors Capital Management LLC Reduces Holdings in Veralto Corporation $VLTO
feed.summary: Advisors Capital Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in Veralto Corporation ($VLTO) by 92.1% in Q4, selling over 51,000 shares. Despite this, Veralto demonstrated strong Q1 results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, and raised its full-year EPS guidance. However, the company faces near-term challenges including a Q2 guidance miss, insider selling, and the stock trading below key moving averages.

feed.title: Ashton Thomas Private Wealth LLC Has $3.02 Million Stake in Amdocs Limited $DOX
feed.summary: Ashton Thomas Private Wealth LLC reduced its stake in Amdocs Limited by 51.0% in the fourth quarter, selling 38,814 shares but still retaining 37,270 shares valued at $3.02 million. Despite this reduction, institutional investors collectively own 92.02% of Amdocs. The company recently beat quarterly EPS estimates, issued positive FY2026 guidance, and increased its quarterly dividend to $0.569, resulting in a 3.5% yield.

feed.title: Chipotle has a 'recipe for growth.' Wall Street is optimistic.
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts are optimistic about Chipotle's growth prospects, with many increasing their price targets and reiterating "Buy" ratings. Key factors contributing to this positive outlook include menu price increases, strong digital sales, and the potential for new store openings and increased traffic. Analysts believe Chipotle has a clear "recipe for growth" for the coming year.

feed.title: Cantor Fitzgerald upgrades Centene stock rating on margin outlook By Investing.com
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald upgraded Centene Corp. (NYSE:CNC) to Overweight from Neutral, raising its price target to $60 from $41, based on clearer margin improvement paths outlined in the company's 2026 guidance. This upgrade comes after Centene reported strong first-quarter 2026 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations, and indicating positive investor confidence in the health insurer's turnaround. InvestingPro analysis also rates Centene as "GREAT" and undervalued, with a fair value of $67.21, significantly higher than its current market price.

feed.title: Advisors Capital Management LLC Trims Position in ExxonMobil Corporation $XOM
feed.summary: Advisors Capital Management LLC reduced its stake in ExxonMobil Corporation (XOM) by 17.9% in the fourth quarter, selling 17,832 shares and leaving its holdings valued at approximately $9.85 million. Despite this, institutional investors collectively own 61.80% of XOM. Analyst sentiment remains largely bullish, with several firms raising target prices, and the company benefits from a strong oil price rally, although some caution on valuation exists after a significant one-year rally.

feed.title: Coincheck Group N.V. to Announce Financial Results For Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2026, on May 12, 2026
feed.summary: Coincheck Group N.V. announced it will release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2026 on Tuesday, May 12, 2026. The company will host a conference call at 5:00 pm ET on the same day, featuring CEO Pascal St-Jean and CFO Jason Sandberg, with a live webcast available on their website. Coincheck Group N.V. is a NASDAQ-listed holding company providing digital asset services, including operating Coincheck, a leading crypto asset trading platform in Japan, and 3iQ Corp.

feed.title: DigitalOcean AI Native Cloud Targets Production Agents And Investor Growth
feed.summary: DigitalOcean has launched its AI-Native Cloud, a developer-centric platform designed for AI inference and agentic workloads, featuring over 15 new functionalities. This platform aims to provide an integrated and cost-effective solution for developers building production AI agents, emphasizing efficiency and open-source support. The launch positions DigitalOcean to potentially increase recurring revenue from AI-heavy customers, though investors should monitor adoption rates and infrastructure spending against competitive pressures from larger cloud providers.

feed.title: Honeywell’s Aerospace Spin‑Off And Dividend Plans Could Be A Game Changer For Honeywell International (HON)
feed.summary: Honeywell International is preparing for the spin-off of Honeywell Aerospace by June 29, 2026, creating a new pure-play aerospace and defense company, while also declaring a quarterly dividend of US$1.19 per share. This move aims to reshape Honeywell's portfolio and return value to shareholders, though macroeconomic and trade risks remain. The company has updated its 2026 sales and EPS guidance in conjunction with the spin-off.

feed.title: FIS CD Prediction Clearing Launch Might Change The Case For Investing In Fidelity National Information Services (FIS)
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) recently launched FIS CD Prediction Clearing, a cloud-native solution for prediction markets. This new platform, designed for high-speed, 24/7 clearing, aligns with FIS's focus on digital payments and fintech infrastructure. While it reinforces FIS's investment narrative, the company's primary near-term catalysts remain execution on cloud and AI fintech solutions, and it still faces risks from competitive and pricing pressures.

feed.title: Did Stronger Q1 Earnings and Dividend Moves Just Shift Dime Community Bancshares' (DCOM) Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: Dime Community Bancshares reported strong first-quarter 2026 results with significant net interest income and net income, plus a declared dividend. These results, coupled with expansion efforts in New York and the hiring of new banking teams, reinforce the company's investment narrative for future growth. The article also highlights dividend support and the company's focus on margin resilience, while cautioning about concentration risk in New York commercial real estate.

feed.title: Is Gartner (IT) Now Offering Value After A 64% One Year Share Price Decline
feed.summary: Gartner's share price has declined 64% over the last year, leading to a valuation score of 4/6. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 47.7%, with an estimated intrinsic value of $286.91 per share against a recent price of $150.12. The article also provides bull and bear case narratives for Gartner, highlighting differing revenue growth assumptions and their impact on fair value estimations.

feed.title: Baird reiterates Avery Dennison stock rating on apparel recovery By Investing.com
feed.summary: Baird has reiterated an Outperform rating on Avery Dennison (NYSE:AVY) with a $210 price target, citing improving apparel end-market comparisons starting in Q2 2026. This is expected to boost Intelligent Labels volume in the second half of the year, which is crucial for investor sentiment. Despite current undervaluation and some downward earnings revisions from analysts, the company recently surpassed Q1 2026 earnings and revenue expectations.

feed.title: Did Docebo’s (TSX:DCBO) New AI Learning Hub and Guidance Hike Just Redefine Its Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: Docebo Inc. recently unveiled a next-generation AI-driven learning platform at Docebo Inspire 2026 and raised its 2026 revenue guidance to US$271.0 million–US$275.0 million, attributing over 50% of recent new product releases to AI-assisted development. While the product-led growth is a near-term catalyst and projected revenue by 2029 is $331.1 million, investors should remain aware of potential risks such as macro-sensitive sales cycles, intense competition, and the uncertain monetization of advanced AI features. The company's integration of its content into popular AI assistants like Microsoft Copilot and ChatGPT could drive adoption but also exposes it to rapid AI commoditization and pricing pressure.

feed.title: Apollon Wealth Management LLC Sells 5,697 Shares of Microsoft Corporation $MSFT
feed.summary: Apollon Wealth Management LLC reduced its stake in Microsoft Corporation by 1.6% in the fourth quarter, selling 5,697 shares and retaining 361,629 shares valued at $174.89 million, making Microsoft its fourth largest position. The software giant recently beat quarterly earnings expectations with $4.14 EPS and $81.27 billion in revenue, prompting analysts to maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $563.72. Microsoft also declared a $0.91 quarterly dividend and saw mixed insider activity, with Director John W. Stanton buying shares and EVP Kathleen T. Hogan selling shares.

feed.title: Citigroup Inc. (NYSE:C) Receives Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" from Analysts
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc. (NYSE:C) has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with a target price of $135.94. The company reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, beating expectations with impressive revenue growth. Citi is also expanding its investment banking in Asia and enhancing its advisory platform while raising its AI market forecast, signaling strong growth drivers despite some insider selling.

feed.title: Humana Inc. $HUM Shares Sold by AMG National Trust Bank
feed.summary: AMG National Trust Bank reduced its stake in Humana Inc. by 42.4% in the fourth quarter, selling 7,189 shares, leaving them with 9,764 shares valued at approximately $2.50 million. The article notes mixed analyst sentiment with an average "Hold" rating and price target of $222.09, though some price targets were cut while others were raised. Humana surpassed Q1 earnings and revenue estimates, provided FY2026 guidance, declared a quarterly dividend, and announced a strategic pharmacy partnership with Mark Cuban’s Cost Plus Drugs, along with a positive Medicare Advantage payment outlook.

feed.title: AMG National Trust Bank Acquires 7,949 Shares of FedEx Corporation $FDX
feed.summary: AMG National Trust Bank significantly increased its stake in FedEx Corporation, purchasing 7,949 additional shares in Q4, bringing its total holdings to 11,304 shares valued at $3.265 million. This move comes as Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for FedEx, citing ongoing cost-cutting initiatives, the planned FedEx Freight spin-off, and returning grounded aircraft to service as key drivers for potential margin improvements. However, the company faces near-term risks including tariff refund returns and exposure to fuel cost volatility from geopolitical events, alongside recent insider selling.

feed.title: AMG National Trust Bank Lowers Stock Holdings in Delek US Holdings, Inc. $DK
feed.summary: AMG National Trust Bank significantly reduced its stake in Delek US Holdings, Inc. by 36% in Q4, selling 39,794 shares. Despite institutional investors owning a large portion of the company and a recent EPS beat, insiders have sold a substantial number of shares, and analysts maintain a "Hold" rating for the stock. Delek US also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.255 per share.

feed.title: Criteo (CRTO) to Release Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: Criteo (NASDAQ:CRTO) is set to release its Q1 2026 earnings before market open on Wednesday, May 6th, with analysts forecasting EPS of $0.57 and revenue of $248.3 million. Insider transactions include a director's purchase of 5,000 shares, increasing his stake by over 23%. Institutional investors own a significant portion of the company, while analysts generally hold a "Hold" rating with an average price target of $30.45.

feed.title: Chipotle Reports Earnings on Wednesday. It Needs to Bring Customers Back to Stores.
feed.summary: Chipotle is set to report earnings on Wednesday, facing challenges with declining same-restaurant sales. The company needs to demonstrate how it plans to attract customers back to its stores amidst concerns about its pricing and value. Investors are keen to see if Chipotle has a "recipe for growth" as suggested by Wall Street optimism.

feed.title: AMG National Trust Bank Makes New Investment in Camden Property Trust $CPT
feed.summary: AMG National Trust Bank has initiated a new position in Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) by acquiring 16,333 shares valued at approximately $1.80 million during the fourth quarter. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings in Camden Property Trust. The company's board has authorized a $600 million share repurchase program and increased its quarterly dividend to $1.06 per share, implying a 4.0% yield.

feed.title: FICO Q2 Deep Dive: Mortgage Surge and New Pricing Model Drive Outperformance
feed.summary: FICO reported better-than-expected Q1 CY2026 revenue and adjusted EPS, driven by a significant surge in mortgage origination activity and the successful adoption of its FICO Platform. The company attributes this outperformance to a 127% year-over-year increase in mortgage revenue and the strategic rollout of its new FICO Score 10T pricing model. FICO has also raised its full-year revenue guidance and is focusing on continued platform adoption and navigating regulatory changes in the credit scoring industry.

feed.title: Century Aluminum resumes production at Grundartangi smelter
feed.summary: Century Aluminum has begun reactivating the second potline at its Grundartangi smelter in Iceland ahead of schedule after transformers were repaired. This line accounts for two-thirds of the plant's total capacity, with full production expected by the end of July. The company also plans to install permanent replacement transformers this fall to ensure continued operation.

feed.title: Deutsche Bank Takes Hit on Commercial Property, Flags It as Risk
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank experienced a significant increase in credit provisions for commercial real estate in the first quarter, rising 77% year over year to €290 million. This surge was attributed to a "single-name event" related to commercial property, indicating a revaluation of existing exposures. The bank's CFO identified commercial real estate as an ongoing area of concern.

feed.title: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) Given Average Recommendation of "Hold" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) has received a consensus "Hold" rating from twenty-three brokerages, with an average 12-month price target of $181.33. Recent insider selling has been noted, with executives selling substantial shares, alongside mixed financial results for Q1 despite an earnings beat.

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet Holdings Inc (ZBH) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Start with 9.3% Revenue Growth
feed.summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings Inc reported a strong start to 2026 with a 9.3% increase in revenue to $2.087 billion and a 15% rise in adjusted EPS to $2.09. Despite operational changes and some account losses in the US, the company saw significant growth in its technology and data sectors, alongside strategic investments in innovation. Zimmer Biomet is maintaining conservative full-year guidance due to ongoing transitions but expects mid-single-digit international growth in the second half of the year.

feed.title: Citi Raises General Motors Company (GM.US) TP to USD108; 1Q26 Results Beat
feed.summary: Citi Research increased its price target for General Motors Company (GM.US) to USD108 from USD105, maintaining a Buy rating after the company's strong first-quarter 2026 results. GM reported an EPS of USD3.7, significantly surpassing both market and broker forecasts, and its adjusted EBIT and free cash flow also exceeded expectations. The positive performance came despite 1Q26 being a seasonally weaker quarter for cash flow and included substantial commercial claims expenses related to electric vehicles.

feed.title: CEOs got millions after boards ‘neutralized’ the impact of tariffs. Some won't say what it was worth
feed.summary: A report found that several company boards adjusted executive compensation to "neutralize" the financial impact of tariffs, ensuring large bonuses for CEOs like Christopher Calio of RTX ($27.7M), James Conroy of Ross Stores ($17.4M), and Richard Dickson of The Gap ($17.2M). While some companies disclosed the dollar amount of these adjustments, many, including RTX, Ross Stores, and The Gap, did not, raising concerns about transparency from executive pay consultants. This practice insulated executives from operational challenges caused by the unexpected trade war, questioning the fairness of compensation linked to business performance.

feed.title: UBS: Apple Inc. (AAPL.US) Mar China Sales Up 78% YoY, 1Q26 Decline Narrower Than Industry
feed.summary: UBS estimates that Apple's iPhone sales in China surged 78% year-over-year in March, significantly narrowing its 1Q26 decline to about 4%, outperforming the overall market. This growth is attributed to Apple's stable supply chain advantages amidst rising memory prices affecting competitors. UBS anticipates continued market share expansion for the iPhone in the second half of 2026, especially with a new foldable model launch expected in September, maintaining a Neutral rating and a USD280 price target.

feed.title: PREVIEW: AWS, advertising set to boost Amazon's Q1 growth
feed.summary: This article previews Amazon's Q1 growth, anticipating that the company's AWS cloud computing services and advertising segments will be key drivers. It suggests that these areas are expected to significantly contribute to Amazon's financial performance during the first quarter.

feed.title: Clear Channel Outdoor (NYSE:CCO) Shares Pass Above 200 Day Moving Average - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Clear Channel Outdoor (NYSE:CCO) shares recently surpassed their 200-day moving average, trading as high as $2.39. Despite this, analysts have a "Reduce" rating on the stock with an average price target of $2.29. The company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and institutional investors have been actively trading its shares.

feed.title: United Dominion Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE:UDR) Receives Average Rating of "Hold" from Analysts

United Dominion Realty Trust, a real estate investment trust, specializes in multifamily apartment communities and engages in development, redevelopment, and strategic acquisitions.

feed.title: Edwards Lifesciences Corporation (NYSE:EW) Receives Average Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" from Brokerages
feed.summary: Edwards Lifesciences Corporation (NYSE:EW) has received an average "Moderate Buy" recommendation from 28 brokerages, with an average 12-month price target of $95.65. This follows strong Q1 earnings, where the company beat EPS and revenue estimates and provided optimistic FY2026 and Q2 guidance. Despite recent insider stock sales totaling $7.12 million, institutional investors hold a significant 79.46% of the company's stock.

feed.title: CubeSmart (NYSE:CUBE) Given Consensus Recommendation of "Hold" by Analysts
feed.summary: Sixteen analysts have issued a "Hold" consensus rating for CubeSmart (NYSE:CUBE), with an average 12-month price target of $43.57. The self-storage REIT's dividend payout ratio of 146.21% suggests the dividend may be unsustainable, despite a 5.4% yield. Insider Jeffrey P. Foster recently sold 10% of his shares, while institutional ownership remains high with significant new investments from firms like Norges Bank and Millennium Management.

feed.title: Simon Property Group, Inc. (NYSE:SPG) Given Consensus Recommendation of "Hold" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Simon Property Group (NYSE:SPG) has received a consensus "Hold" rating from brokerages, with ten out of fifteen firms recommending a "Hold" and five suggesting a "Buy." The average 12-month price target is set at $200.14. The company recently announced a $2.0 billion share buyback program and a quarterly dividend of $2.20, representing an annualized yield of approximately 4.3%.

feed.title: ResMed Inc. (NYSE:RMD) Given Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Fifteen brokerages have issued a "Moderate Buy" consensus recommendation for ResMed Inc. (NYSE:RMD), with an average 12-month price target of $294.55. Despite recent insider sales totaling $5.23 million, the company reported strong Q3 earnings, beating analyst expectations with an 11% year-over-year revenue increase. Analysts project an EPS of $11.05 for the current fiscal year.
